backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that combines authorization and blob-storage mixins to expose CRUD endpoints for Poetry, Dua, Song, and UserProfile types, with admin-only content creation, maintenance mode toggle, and user management (block/unblock).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two bug-fix features—fixing the 'Failed to load users' error and the 'Failed to update maintenance mode' error in the admin panel—to their affected file (useQueries.ts) and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, pages, hooks, and admin forms in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Dard-e-munasif', setting up the root div, favicon, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Login, Mix (home), Poetry, Dua, Songs, and Admin pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: An admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with per-item delete functionality backed by confirmation dialogs and query invalidation.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: A form component for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress via a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: A form component for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress with a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: A React form component for uploading songs with title, artist, and audio file fields, using the useCreateSong mutation and ExternalBlob for upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: An admin panel component for managing users (search, block/unblock) and toggling maintenance mode, using React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, AudioContext focus management, MediaSession integration, enforced unmuted full-volume playback, and a permission-denied guard UI.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay component shown to blocked users, displaying a suspension message and a WhatsApp deep-link button to contact the admin.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Renders a card component for a single Dua post with like, download, copy, and share functionality, plus a full-screen modal on click.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: Displays a full-screen modal overlay for a Poetry or Dua post, showing title, content, optional image, audio player, and like count while tracking history.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: Slide-out hamburger menu panel that shows browsing history and offline downloads, with playback and delete controls for downloaded audio.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout wrapper that handles credential checks, ban/maintenance state, navigation guards, theme toggling, and renders the bottom nav bar.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: Full-screen maintenance mode overlay displaying an animated wrench icon and a message that the app is temporarily unavailable.
Full-screen music player modal that auto-plays the selected song, displays album art, and provides play/pause and seek controls via the audio playback hook.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard component that wraps children behind a hardcoded 8-digit PIN, persisting auth state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a poetry post with like, share, copy, and image download actions, plus a full-screen modal view.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a song post with inline play/pause, like, share, and copy actions, plus a now-playing modal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, initializing admin access control if an admin token is present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminActor.ts: A React hook that initializes a singleton admin backend actor with an optional admin token, using module-level state to avoid redundant initialization across renders.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: A React hook providing global singleton audio playback state and controls (play, pause, seek, wake lock, MediaSession metadata) shared across all components via a listener pattern.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: A React hook that manages offline audio downloads using an IndexedDB-backed store, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: A React hook that tracks playback history using IndexedDB, providing functions to add entries with timestamps and refresh the history list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React context provider and hook implementing Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating Poetry, Dua, Song, and User data via ICP actors, including read queries and like/create/register mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Stub hook that previously managed a Web Audio filter chain; all methods are now no-ops since audio plays directly via HTMLAudioElement.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and configuring Tailwind base/utilities, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and typography classes for Urdu/Nastaliq and poetry content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: PIN-guarded admin panel page with tabbed sections for uploading Poetry/Dua/Song content, managing existing content, and controlling users.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all Dua entries in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step login page where users enter a name and select a server; generates a device fingerprint, registers the user via mutation, and stores credentials in localStorage before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Main feed page that aggregates Poetry, Dua, and Song content into a chronologically sorted, filterable list, and displays the logged-in user's unique identity code with a copy button.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays a paginated grid of poetry posts fetched via React Query, handling loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and empty state.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of song posts fetched via React Query, with loading skeletons, error handling with retry, and an empty state message.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB helper functions for initializing the database and performing CRUD operations on browsing history and downloaded content stores.
frontend/src/utils/timeAgo.ts: Converts an Internet Computer nanosecond timestamp (bigint) into a human-readable relative time string such as '3 days ago'.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL and hash query parameters, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-query/animate plugins, Urdu font family, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and existing fix features, specifically two admin-panel bugs: failing user-list query and failing maintenance-mode toggle mutation.
